items.name_en: 【Paris Grey ❤ Medium】
items.name_cn:
【Paris Grey ❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote bag is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_en: 【Paris Grey New Size】
items.name_cn:
【Paris Grey New Size】
Dior Mini Book Tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery perfectly presents it, adding a highlight to your outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini size is so adorable! The small bag shape is also very convenient for holding small items~ Whoever uses it will be stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11

items.name_en: 【Passport Cover Wallet】m62089 83519 Monogram (Badge)
items.name_cn:
【Passport Cover Wallet】m62089 83519 Monogram (Badge)
This passport cover is part of the Flight Mode collection, celebrating the spirit of travel. Made from monogram canvas, it features vintage hotel labels selected from the extensive collection gathered by Louis Vuitton's grandson Gaston-Louis in the early 20th century. The leather-lined lid also includes four card slots.
Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 【Passport Holder】M64502 62089 Black/Floral (Vintage)
items.name_cn:
【Passport Holder】M64502 62089 Black/Floral (Vintage)
The slender design fits neatly into various pockets, exuding the charm of the 'Portefeuille Slender'. Made from brushed Monogram calfskin, it has a treasure-like expression. The worn leather patina and faded Monogram pattern evoke a depth reminiscent of a life lived through time. With 4 card slots and a bill compartment, it is perfect for daily use.
Size: 10.0x14.0x2.0 cm

items.name_en: 【Pico Side Trunk Handbag】 m83018 46358
items.name_cn:
【Pico Side Trunk Handbag】 m83018 46358
The Pico Side Trunk handbag combines Monogram canvas with leather trim, referencing the brand's classic hard suitcases with the S-lock closure and metal corners to pay homage to Louis Vuitton's travel heritage. The handle and adjustable shoulder strap are detachable, and a secure zipper completes the functional details.
Size: 14.0 x 10.0 x 6.5 cm
